Sector — Agriculture

The real problems

Why precision farming without IoT costs you every season.

Four operational blind spots that cost farms yields, quality, and staff time every year. Here's what changes after we deploy the monitoring infrastructure.

01
No real-time field visibilityDaily visits to real-time

Without real-time sensor data, farm managers drive across hundreds of hectares daily to check soil moisture, temperatures, and crop conditions. A single missed visit during a critical growth window can cost an entire season.

Field check frequency
Before1–2x daily visits
AfterContinuous real-time
Issue detection time
Before12–24 hours
After< 3 minutes
02
Delayed alert escalation3-minute alert response

When soil moisture drops below critical thresholds, frost is incoming, or equipment fails in a remote field, the information sits unnoticed until the next manual check. By then, the damage is already done and the cost is already incurred.

Alert-to-response time
Before4–24 hours
After< 3 minutes
Critical events missed
Before3–6 per season
After0
03
No harvest timing dataData-driven harvest windows

Harvest timing decisions are made on experience and intuition, not data. Harvesting two days too early or too late cuts yield quality and market price significantly. For large farms, that variance translates directly into six-figure losses.

Harvest timing accuracy
BeforeExperience-based
AfterSensor + AI-driven
Yield quality score
BeforeInconsistent
AfterOptimised
04
Fragmented supplier commsAutomated procurement

Reordering fertilisers, pesticides, and fuel manually means monitoring stock levels by hand, calling suppliers, and chasing deliveries. A single out-of-stock during peak season can halt operations for days.

Procurement time per month
Before8–12 hours
After< 30 min
Supply stockout incidents
Before2–4 per season
After0
What we build

From sensors in the ground to insight on your phone.

We design and deploy the full precision agriculture stack: IoT sensor networks, real-time dashboards, automated alerting, harvest planning, and procurement automation — built for your land.

IoT Sensor Network

End-to-end IoT deployment across your land: soil moisture, temperature, humidity, and equipment telemetry — all feeding a live dashboard accessible from anywhere.

  • Soil moisture, temp, and humidity sensors deployed field by field
  • Equipment telemetry monitoring pump and irrigation system health
  • GPS-tagged sensor placement with field map overlay
  • Dashboard accessible via web and mobile — no app install required
IoTMQTTLoRaWANNode-RED

Get my free estimate →
Case study

Agri Novatex · Bucharest

Precision Farming · Cereal Production
The Problem

A 400-hectare cereal farm outside Bucharest with no real-time monitoring infrastructure. Field checks required daily manual visits consuming 3 staff-days per week. Two irrigation failures in the previous season went undetected for 18+ hours, causing significant crop damage.

What We Built

Full IoT sensor deployment across all 400 hectares: soil moisture, temperature, and humidity sensors in each field zone. Real-time dashboard, SMS/WhatsApp alert escalation with auto-escalation logic, AI harvest timing system, and automated supplier procurement triggers.

The Result

Zero missed events since deployment. Field staff visits reduced from 15 per week to 3. Alert-to-response time reduced from up to 24 hours to under 3 minutes. Harvest timing accuracy improved by 22%. First-season ROI achieved in 4 months.

400ha
Monitored
<3min
Alert response
0
Events missed
